samples.text: A plant grows tall in total darkness with no light at all. Is this expected based on common sense?
A plant grows tall in complete darkness with no light. Does this match everyday common sense?
Vegetation grows tall in absolute darkness with no illumination. Is this expected based on common sense?
Plants need light for photosynthesis. With no light at all a plant cannot grow tall. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A plant grows tall in total darkness with no light at all. There are several books on the shelf. Is this expected based on common sense?
